content:
# Final Review Proposal
**Producer:** agent:codex/gpt-5.4-xhigh

## Summary

Reviewed the branch diff, including the end-to-end stop-path logic in src/cli/run.rs and the supporting PID-record code in src/adapters/fs.rs. The new revalidation closes the handoff race without introducing a new unsafe path, and targeted stop-related regression coverage passed (`cargo test run_stop_` plus the new/unit and existing CLI stop-attempt tests). No correctness, safety, or robustness issues found in the current changes.

## Amendments

None.
